name: CO-ED
overview: Twins Shikha and Nikhil couldn't be more different. But when their all-boys and all-girls schools suddenly go co-ed, the chaos of teenagehood hits them head-on. Now, both must confront new feelings, friendships, and the messy business of growing up together.
